turns.query: Help me analyze the hourly pollution trend at the 24-hour period ending 2025-07-02 15:00 for Monitoring Station (station_id: 179), correlating with emissions from Tangshan Donghua Steel Enterprise Group (company_id: 2419).
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 1. 获取站点179和企业2419的坐标信息
query_coords = text("""
SELECT 
    aqs.id as station_id, aqs.name as station_name, aqs.coordinate,
    pc.id as company_id, pc.name as company_name, pc.coordinate as company_coordinate
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.id = 2419
WHERE aqs.id = 179
""")
coords_df = pd.read_sql(query_coords, engine)
print("站点和企业坐标信息：")
print(coords_df[['station_id', 'station_name', 'company_id', 'company_name']])

# 2. 计算距离和方位角
station_coord = coords_df['coordinate'].iloc[0]
company_coord = coords_df['company_coordinate'].iloc[0]

# 计算距离（米转公里）
distance_m = station_coord.distance(company_coord)
distance_km = distance_m / 1000.0

# 计算方位角（从企业到站点的方向）
# ST_Azimuth返回从第一个点到第二个点的方位角（弧度），范围[-PI, PI]
bearing_rad = station_coord.azimuth(company_coord)
bearing_deg = bearing_rad * 180.0 / 3.141592653589793

print(f"\n距离: {distance_km:.2f} km")
print(f"方位角: {bearing_deg:.2f}°")

# 3. 获取站点179在24小时窗口内的PM2.5数据
# 时间窗口：24h ending 2025-07-02 15:00，end-inclusive
# 包含 2025-07-01 16:00 到 2025-07-02 15:00 的读数
query_station_pm25 = text("""
SELECT timestamp, pm2_5, aqi, pm10, so2, no2, o3, co
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = 179
  AND timestamp >= '2025-07-01 16:00:00'
  AND timestamp <= '2025-07-02 15:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
station_data = pd.read_sql(query_station_pm25, engine)
print(f"\n站点179小时数据记录数: {len(station_data)}")
print(station_data.head(10))

# 4. 获取企业2419在24小时窗口内的排放数据
query_company_emission = text("""
SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, co, no2, hc, nmhc, hcl
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2419
  AND timestamp >= '2025-07-01 16:00:00'
  AND timestamp <= '2025-07-02 15:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
company_data = pd.read_sql(query_company_emission, engine)
print(f"\n企业2419小时排放数据记录数: {len(company_data)}")
print(company_data.head(10))

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 1. 获取站点179和企业2419的坐标信息（使用PostGIS函数计算）
query_analysis = text("""
WITH coords AS (
    SELECT 
        aqs.id as station_id, 
        aqs.name as station_name, 
        aqs.coordinate as station_coord,
        pc.id as company_id, 
        pc.name as company_name, 
        pc.coordinate as company_coord
    FROM air_quality_station aqs
    JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.id = 2419
    WHERE aqs.id = 179
)
SELECT 
    station_id, station_name, company_id, company_name,
    ST_Distance(station_coord, company_coord) / 1000.0 as distance_km,
    ST_Azimuth(station_coord, company_coord) * 180.0 / PI() as bearing_deg
FROM coords
""")
coords_df = pd.read_sql(query_analysis, engine)
print("站点和企业坐标信息：")
print(coords_df[['station_id', 'station_name', 'company_id', 'company_name', 'distance_km', 'bearing_deg']])

# 存储距离和方位角
distance_km = float(coords_df['distance_km'].iloc[0])
bearing_deg = float(coords_df['bearing_deg'].iloc[0])
print(f"\n距离: {distance_km:.2f} km")
print(f"方位角: {bearing_deg:.2f}°")

# 2. 获取站点179在24小时窗口内的PM2.5统计数据
# 时间窗口：24h ending 2025-07-02 15:00，end-inclusive
# 包含 2025-07-01 16:00 到 2025-07-02 15:00 的读数
query_station_stats = text("""
SELECT 
    ROUND(AVG(pm2_5), 2) as mean_pm25,
    ROUND(MAX(pm2_5), 2) as max_pm25,
    COUNT(*) as record_count
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = 179
  AND timestamp >= '2025-07-01 16:00:00'
  AND timestamp <= '2025-07-02 15:00:00'
""")
station_stats = pd.read_sql(query_station_stats, engine)
print(f"\n站点179 PM2.5统计:")
print(station_stats)

station_mean_pm25 = float(station_stats['mean_pm25'].iloc[0])
station_max_pm25 = float(station_stats['max_pm25'].iloc[0])

# 3. 获取企业2419在24小时窗口内的总排放数据
query_company_total = text("""
SELECT 
    ROUND(SUM(exhaust_gas), 2) as total_flue_gas,
    COUNT(*) as record_count
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2419
  AND timestamp >= '2025-07-01 16:00:00'
  AND timestamp <= '2025-07-02 15:00:00'
""")
company_total = pd.read_sql(query_company_total, engine)
print(f"\n企业2419排放统计:")
print(company_total)

company_total_flue_gas = float(company_total['total_flue_gas'].iloc[0])

# 4. 获取详细的站点小时数据和排放数据用于趋势分析
query_station_detail = text("""
SELECT timestamp, pm2_5, aqi, pm10, so2, no2, o3, co
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = 179
  AND timestamp >= '2025-07-01 16:00:00'
  AND timestamp <= '2025-07-02 15:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
station_detail = pd.read_sql(query_station_detail, engine)
print(f"\n站点179详细数据记录数: {len(station_detail)}")
print(station_detail.head(10))

query_company_detail = text("""
SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, co, no2, hc, nmhc, hcl
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2419
  AND timestamp >= '2025-07-01 16:00:00'
  AND timestamp <= '2025-07-02 15:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
company_detail = pd.read_sql(query_company_detail, engine)
print(f"\n企业2419详细排放数据记录数: {len(company_detail)}")
print(company_detail.head(10))

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 1. 获取站点179和企业2419的坐标信息
query_coords = text("""
SELECT 
    aqs.id as station_id, aqs.name as station_name,
    pc.id as company_id, pc.name as company_name,
    ST_Distance(aqs.coordinate, pc.coordinate) / 1000.0 as distance_km,
    ST_Azimuth(aqs.coordinate, pc.coordinate) * 180.0 / PI() as bearing_deg
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.id = 2419
WHERE aqs.id = 179
""")
coords_df = pd.read_sql(query_coords, engine)
distance_km = float(coords_df['distance_km'].iloc[0])
bearing_deg = float(coords_df['bearing_deg'].iloc[0])
print(f"距离: {distance_km:.2f} km, 方位角: {bearing_deg:.2f}°")

# 2. 获取站点179在24小时窗口内的PM2.5数据
query_station_pm25 = text("""
SELECT pm2_5, aqi, pm10, so2, no2, o3, co
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = 179
  AND timestamp >= '2025-07-01 16:00:00'
  AND timestamp <= '2025-07-02 15:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
station_data = pd.read_sql(query_station_pm25, engine)
print(f"站点179记录数: {len(station_data)}")
station_mean_pm25 = float(station_data['pm2_5'].mean())
station_max_pm25 = float(station_data['pm2_5'].max())
print(f"站点PM2.5均值: {station_mean_pm25:.2f}, 最大值: {station_max_pm25:.2f}")

# 3. 获取企业2419在24小时窗口内的排放数据
query_company_emission = text("""
SELECT exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, co, no2, hc, nmhc, hcl
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2419
  AND timestamp >= '2025-07-01 16:00:00'
  AND timestamp <= '2025-07-02 15:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
company_data = pd.read_sql(query_company_emission, engine)
print(f"企业2419记录数: {len(company_data)}")
company_total_flue_gas = float(company_data['exhaust_gas'].sum())
print(f"企业总烟气量: {company_total_flue_gas:.2f}")

# 4. 合并数据用于趋势分析
merged_df = pd.merge(station_data, company_data, left_index=True, right_index=True)
print("\n合并数据前10行:")
print(merged_df.head(10))

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 1. 获取站点179和企业2419的坐标信息
query_coords = text("""
SELECT 
    aqs.id as station_id, aqs.name as station_name,
    pc.id as company_id, pc.name as company_name,
    ST_Distance(aqs.coordinate, pc.coordinate) / 1000.0 as distance_km,
    ST_Azimuth(aqs.coordinate, pc.coordinate) * 180.0 / PI() as bearing_deg
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.id = 2419
WHERE aqs.id = 179
""")
coords_df = pd.read_sql(query_coords, engine)
distance_km = float(coords_df['distance_km'].iloc[0])
bearing_deg = float(coords_df['bearing_deg'].iloc[0])
print(f"距离: {distance_km:.2f} km, 方位角: {bearing_deg:.2f}°")

# 2. 获取站点179在24小时窗口内的PM2.5数据
query_station_pm25 = text("""
SELECT pm2_5, aqi, pm10, so2, no2, o3, co
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = 179
  AND timestamp >= '2025-07-01 16:00:00'
  AND timestamp <= '2025-07-02 15:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
station_data = pd.read_sql(query_station_pm25, engine)
print(f"站点179记录数: {len(station_data)}")
station_mean_pm25 = float(station_data['pm2_5'].mean())
station_max_pm25 = float(station_data['pm2_5'].max())
print(f"站点PM2.5均值: {station_mean_pm25:.2f}, 最大值: {station_max_pm25:.2f}")

# 3. 获取企业2419在24小时窗口内的排放数据（修正列名，移除不存在的no2列）
query_company_emission = text("""
SELECT exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, co, hc, nmhc, hcl
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2419
  AND timestamp >= '2025-07-01 16:00:00'
  AND timestamp <= '2025-07-02 15:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
company_data = pd.read_sql(query_company_emission, engine)

company_total_flue_gas = float(company_data['exhaust_gas'].sum())
print(f"企业总烟气量: {company_total_flue_gas:.2f}")

# 4. 打印详细数据用于趋势分析
print("\n站点179小时数据:")
print(station_data.to_string())
print("\n企业2419小时排放数据:")
print(company_data.to_string())
